text: A giraffe grazing on grass with fence in the background.
A man in a military uniform standing in an office holding a bike.
A woman standing and smiling at camera, wearing hat and raincoat, and holding a paper cup in hand, with two brightly multicolored birds perched on her lower bent arm and one bird on her shoulder.
A small bathroom door is open to show a single toilet.
A man riding a dirt bike is airborne after hitting a small jump.
A group of dogs are swimming in dirty water.
A white plate topped with a slice of cake next to a spoon.
a man catching a wave on his surfboard
A man and two sheep stand on green grass with a castle in the background.
A tennis player starts to hit the ball with the racket
